category_sources: Official Premake docs are a Premake 5 user guide covering project scripts and build generation.
source_facts.description describes Premake as a Lua-based build system for writing once and building anywhere.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and website branding use Premake.
source_facts.name supplies the package name premake.
docs_sources: Official Premake documentation site provides a dedicated docs section with Getting Started, Writing Premake Scripts, Extending Premake, and Reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official docs cover Premake scripts, workspaces, projects, configurations, platforms, and command-line arguments.
source_facts.description identifies a Lua-based build system.
